settings.title: Settings
settings.signup_setup_flow_subtitle: Open language, region, theme and notification steps
settings.book_reports_subtitle: View reports and mark as read
settings.terms_content:
Vellum Terms of Use

Last Updated: February 15, 2026

1. General Provisions
By using the Vellum app, you are deemed to have accepted the following terms. The app serves as a platform for publishing and consuming digital content.

2. User Accounts
• You must be at least 18 years old to create an account.
• You are responsible for the security of your account information.
• Each user may create only one account.

3. Content Policy
• Published content must comply with copyright laws.
• Content that is unlawful, obscene, or includes hate speech is prohibited.
• The platform reserves the right to remove inappropriate content.

4. Subscription and Payments
• The Vellum Pro subscription can be purchased monthly or annually.
• Subscription cancellation takes effect at the end of the billing period.
• Payments are processed through secure payment providers.

5. Intellectual Property
• Authors own the copyright to the content they publish.
• The platform has a limited license to use the content for promotional purposes.

6. Limitations of Liability
• The platform is not responsible for disputes between users.
• No liability is accepted for data losses caused by technical failures.

7. Contact
For questions, you can write to vexorabyte@gmail.com.
settings.privacy_content:
Vellum Privacy Policy

Last Updated: February 15, 2026

1. Data We Collect
• Identity information: Email address, username
• Usage data: Reading history, preferences
• Subscription information: Plan type, billing period details (card information is not stored)

2. How We Use Data
Collected data is used for the following purposes:
• Account management and authentication
• Content recommendations and personalization
• Processing subscription-related transactions
• Ensuring platform security

3. Data Sharing
• Your data is not shared with third parties for marketing purposes.
• It may be shared with competent authorities when required by law.
• Secure payment providers are used for payment processing.

4. Cookies
• Cookies required for session management are used.
• Analytical cookies are used to improve your experience.

5. Data Security
• All data is encrypted and stored.
• Regular security audits are conducted.
• Communication security is ensured using SSL/TLS.

6. User Rights
• You may request access to your data.
• You may request deletion of your data.
• You have the right to data portability.

7. Contact
For privacy-related questions, you can write to vexorabyte@gmail.com.

settings.faq_how_author: How do I become an author?
settings.faq_cancel_sub: How do I cancel my subscription?
settings.faq_delete_account: How do I delete my account?
settings.faq_what_is_a: Vellum is a platform where writers create and publish books and stories. Readers can follow authors to keep up with new chapters and updates.
settings.faq_how_author_a: Use the Writing Studio to create books and chapters. Some author badges (e.g., Pro Author) are granted only by the developer. To publish, you also need to meet the publishing requirements (at least 3 chapters/pages and 5,000 words).
settings.faq_subscription_a: With a Vellum Pro subscription, you get access to more Writing Studio and publishing features. You can choose monthly or yearly billing, and after you cancel, your access stays until the end of the billing period.
settings.faq_cancel_sub_a: To cancel your subscription, use the “Manage Subscription” screen in the app. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period, and you lose access to Pro features after that.
settings.faq_delete_account_a: To delete your account, contact us at vexorabyte@gmail.com. Your request will be reviewed and your associated data will be removed.
settings.maintenance_subtitle: When enabled, everyone sees the maintenance screen.
settings.maintenance_message_hint: E.g. We are updating our servers, please try again shortly.
settings.announcement_subtitle: Shows a system announcement at the top of the notifications screen.
settings.announcement_body_hint: Short description. E.g. Offline reading is now available in Vellum Pro.
settings.remove_book_confirm: Are you sure you want to permanently remove "{title}"? This cannot be undone. The book and all chapters will be deleted.
settings.warning_message: You are receiving a warning due to reports about "{title}". Please review your content.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.what_you_get: What You Get with Vellum Pro
subscription.cancel_confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel? After cancellation you will lose access to Pro features.
subscription.cancel_dialog_emotional: We'd be sad to see you go. Would you like to keep your Writing Studio, publishing tools, and premium benefits?
subscription.manage_store_hint_ios: iOS subscriptions are managed via the App Store. The App Store subscriptions page has been opened.
subscription.manage_store_error: Could not open subscription management. Please try from App Store > Subscriptions.
subscription.cancel_goodbye_subtitle: It was wonderful having you here. Come back anytime, our door is always open.
subscription.all_pro_access: You have access to all Pro features
subscription.faq_manage: How do I manage my subscription?
subscription.faq_manage_a: Tap "Manage Subscription" to change plan, cancel or restore easily.
subscription.faq_after_cancel_a: Your subscription stays active until the end of the period. Then you lose access to Pro features. Your existing books remain published.
subscription.faq_resubscribe_a: Yes, you can subscribe again anytime. Choose monthly or yearly.
subscription.faq_refund_a: Refunds are handled by the store (App Store or Google Play). Use Manage Subscription for details.
subscription.feature1_sub: Write and publish as many books as you like.
subscription.feature2_sub: Create professional content with advanced formatting.
subscription.feature3_sub: Display the trusted author badge on your profile.
subscription.feature4_sub: Track reader analytics and book performance.
subscription.feature5_sub: Get fast answers to your questions.
subscription.premium_title:
Enjoy Premium Tools
on Every Plan
subscription.pro_description: Our streamlined tools help writers deliver better content, faster.
subscription.benefit_1_subtitle: Unlock your full potential with instant and unlimited access.
subscription.benefit_2_subtitle: Your always-on helper for writing and productivity goals.
subscription.benefit_3_subtitle: Stay consistent with personalized writing reminders.
subscription.restore_not_found: No subscription was found to restore.
subscription.success_subtitle: All premium features are now enabled on your account.
